_meta: Workspace-tier MCP config for LogueOS-Console. Gemini CLI discovers this when CWD is anywhere inside this repo (including the LogueOS-Console-w* worktrees that the dispatch_listener spawns into). The gateway is the SOLE MCP server here on purpose — workers go through the project-miru MCP gateway, which gates tools per the X-Miru-Tool-Profile header injected at spawn time. Direct MCP servers (notion, git, perplexity, etc.) are NOT exposed here because that would bypass the gateway's per-trace access control. Operator interactive sessions in this repo also get only the gateway; for direct tool access cd into D:\dev\miru and use the full MCP set there.
